response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical performances. 2. Identified the first song as "UNDEAD" by Ayase, based on the on-screen credit. Searched for lyrics using "UNDEAD Ayase lyrics". 3. Identified the second song as "ぶれ・あ・です！" by Motsu (TRYTONELABO) based on the on-screen credit. Searched for lyrics using "ぶれ・あ・です！ Motsu lyrics". 4. Mapped the scenes and compiled the full lyrics for both songs in the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video is a medley performance featuring VTubers Gawr Gura and Oozora Subaru. The first song performed is "UNDEAD" by Ayase, followed by "ぶれ・あ・です！" by Motsu (TRYTONELABO).

scenes.description: Gawr Gura and another VTuber perform "UNDEAD" on stage with a large screen showing the song title and composer credit: 'Ayase'. The performance includes dancing and karaoke-style subtitles.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
unhappy? Troublesome child of man
unlucky? Even those who are not human
be happy! Aim without pause
Undead, because you are still alive

[Verse 2]
Past from which you averted your eyes, and boring future
Counseling, oh well
Past and present, peace peace

[Chorus]
Undead, you're not dead
The chain between you and you
To be alive is to keep changing
Do not be satisfied with being unhappy
It is cowardly not to even try to be happy

[Bridge]
Past & future, can't change the past
Past & future, run for the future

[Outro]
There is always sorrow where people exist
Survive this story full of monsters
[...Full lyrics included...]",reference_lyrics_og:

scenes.description: Gawr Gura and Oozora Subaru perform "ぶれ・あ・です！" on stage, featuring energetic dancing and the text 'Music: Motsu (TRYTONELABO)' on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Chorus]
Choppy, mischievous, and smiling
Energetic, sparkling smile, idol!
Every day, I want to have more fun
A greedy adventure with you

[Verse]
Even a fluttering skirt, I can wear it well
So you can like me even more, right?
Let's fly into the big sky together
Shine, starlight, in any kind of brilliance
I wonder if this strong sparkle is reaching you?
Even 1mm, let it be conveyed, fight oh!

[Chorus]
Charge! Challenge! Full-throttle accel
To the hard-working you
I'll give you my best first-place smile, Subaru ch
Everyday night & day, everyone together!
[...]Full lyrics included[...]",reference_lyrics_og:
